plugins.name: gaia-security
plugins.description: Keeps you in the loop only when it matters. Gaia Security analyzes every command and classifies it into risk tiers: read-only queries run freely, simulations and validations pass through, and state-changing operations (create, delete, apply, push) pause for your explicit approval before executing. Irreversible commands like dropping databases or deleting cloud infrastructure are permanently blocked.

plugins.name: gaia-ops
plugins.description: Full DevOps orchestration for Claude Code. Six specialized agents handle the complete development lifecycle — analysis, planning, execution, and deployment. Gaia-Ops scans your codebase to understand it and injects the right context into each sub-agent. Every command is classified by risk: read-only runs freely, state changes pause for your approval, and irreversible operations are permanently blocked.
